lessons.title: I Have a Pet
lessons.topic: Cat, Dog, Bird and the I like pattern

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet likes to climb trees?
Which pet can fly high in the sky?
Which pet lives in water?

steps.title: Tom's Pets
steps.text: Tom has a pet. It is a cat. Tom says, 'I like my cat.' The cat is with a bird. Do you like birds?

questions.question: What does Tom say about his cat?

steps.explanation: Say 'I like' to talk about pets you love.

steps.audio_text: I have a dog. He likes to play. Do you like dogs?

questions.question_text: What is the word for an animal you keep at home? (Vocabulary question)
I like ___. (Fill in the blank question, Grammar Pattern)
True or False: A bird can fly high. (Reading comprehension question)
Which animal barks? (Reading comprehension question, related to lesson content)

lessons.title: I Don't Like...
lessons.topic: Rabbit, Mouse, Turtle and negative preference

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What animal has big ears and hops?
Which pet is small and squeaks?
Which animal lives in a shell?

steps.title: Turtle's Friends
steps.text: Look! A turtle is slow. I don't like the mouse. I like the rabbit. The rabbit jumps high.

steps.explanation: Use 'I like' for things you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: I like rabbits, but I don't like mice. My brother likes turtles. Do you like turtles too?

questions.question: What animal does he not like?

questions.question_text: Which animal hops and has long ears? (Vocabulary question)
I don't like ___. (Grammar pattern question)
True or False: Turtles are very fast? (Reading comprehension question)
Which animal lives in a shell? (Vocabulary question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal do you see swimming in the water? 🐠
questions.hint: This animal can live in a bowl!

questions.question_text: Which pet lives in a hutch and loves to nibble carrots? 🐇
questions.hint: Think about which animal has long ears and hops!

questions.question_text: Which animal do you see climbing up a tree? 🐱
questions.hint: Look for the animal that purrs and chases mice!

steps.title: Splash the Fish
steps.text: Do you like water? Splash the fish does! Splash is in the pond. I like Splash because it is cute. Do you like Splash?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: Do you like fish? I like fish because they are so colorful and they swim gently in the water.

questions.question: Why do I like fish?
questions.answer: They are colorful and swim gently.
options: They are colorful and swim gently.

questions.question_text: What do fish live in?
Do you like ___? (Grammar question)
Are fish cute? (Reading comprehension question based on lesson)
What word do we use to say 'Yes' in English?
Complete the sentence: 'Do you like pets? ___, I do.'

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet can swim and has a shell?
questions.hint: This pet loves to swim in water and carries its house!

questions.question_text: Which pet is known to talk and mimic sounds?
questions.hint: This pet loves to sit on a perch and can be very colorful!

questions.question_text: Which pet likes to dig in the garden and play catch?
questions.hint: This pet often wags its tail and barks!

steps.title: Pets and Preferences
steps.text: My name is Mia. I like dogs and fish. I have one big dog. I don't like snakes. Do you like fish? Yes, I do!

questions.question: Does Mia have a big dog?

steps.audio_text: I have three friendly dogs. They love playing with their ball. I like taking them to the park.

questions.question: How many dogs does he have?

steps.prompt: Tell me one pet you like and one pet you don't like. You can say: I like cats, I don't like frogs.
steps.expected_text: i like cats i don't like frogs

questions.question_text: Fill in the blank: I ___ dogs. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'cat'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Do you like cats?' asks about liking cats. (Reading comprehension question)
What is the main topic of the lesson? (Comprehension question)
